capabilities: Adapt the Transaction Pattern to AI prompting by incorporating domain-specific constraints, ensuring reliable execution and validation.

procedure.action: Analyze AI prompting requirements and extract domain-specific constraints using domain experts using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Design transaction steps with AI-specific examples, ensuring each step aligns with extracted constraints using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Invoke transaction logic using a state machine to manage AI prompt states and transitions following the specified pattern; write a unit test covering the primary code path; assert test_coverage >= 0.8 for the modified module before marking complete.

Compose validation mechanisms to verify prompt execution against domain constraints by composing module interfaces via adapter pattern; assert input/output type contracts match before connecting; assert integration_error_count < 1 after contract validation.

Log transaction outcomes and errors using structured logging for traceability and debugging using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

summary: Specialize the Transaction Pattern for AI prompting by integrating domain-specific constraints and examples, ensuring robust execution and validation.
title: Specialization of Transaction Pattern in AI Prompting

failureConditions: AI prompts fail to execute due to missing domain constraints.

Transaction steps do not align with AI-specific requirements; this occurs when the operation proceeds without pre-condition validation, allowing malformed input to propagate and corrupt downstream state silently.

Validation mechanisms miss domain-specific errors; this occurs when the operation proceeds without pre-condition validation, allowing malformed input to propagate and corrupt downstream state silently.
metrics: test_coverage >= 0.8 for the modified module before marking complete
input/output type contracts match before connecting
successConditions: Run test cases to ensure AI prompts adhere to domain constraints; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Check logs for structured entries of transaction states and errors; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Simulate failure scenarios to verify transaction rollback mechanisms; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
